title: Los Justos
overview: Atilio begins a new life when his daughter moves him to a nursing home, where he meets Beto, a clever and resourceful man. Together, they sneak out to visit Atilio’s late wife’s grave and accidentally witness a money laundering operation in the cemetery, involving hidden cash in a coffin. Inspired by the chance to change their lives, Atilio, Beto, and Doña Rosa—a sharp woman from the home—team up to investigate the scheme, hoping to seize the opportunity and find new purpose.
